title: Sanarwar Sirri
policyHeading: Manufar Sirri ga shafin yanar gizon kasuwanci
section1Body: Barka da zuwa [www.tanzanite.site]. Muna daraja sirrinka kuma mun kuduri aniyar kare bayananka na sirri. Wannan Manufar Sirri tana bayanin yadda muke tattarawa, amfani, bayyanawa da kare bayananka lokacin da ka ziyarci shafinmu [www.tanzanite.site] kuma ka yi amfani da sabis ɗinmu.
section2Intro: Zamu iya tattara nau’ikan bayanan sirri masu zuwa:
identityDesc: Cikakken suna, sunan mai amfani, kalmar sirri
contactDesc: Adireshin imel, lambar waya, adireshin isarwa/biya
transactionDesc: Tarihin sayayya, bayanan biyan kuɗi (ana sarrafawa ta hanyoyin biyan kuɗi na ɓangare na uku masu tsaro)
technicalDesc: Adireshin IP, nau’in burauza, bayanan na’ura, cookies da sauransu
section3Intro: Muna amfani da bayananka don waɗannan dalilai:
useProcessOrders: Don sarrafa ododi da isar da kaya
useManageAccount: Don kula da asusunka da samar da tallafin abokin ciniki
useImproveSite: Don inganta ayyukan shafin da ƙwarewar mai amfani
usePromotions: Don tura tayin talla (idan ka bayar da izini)
useLegal: Don cika wajibcin doka da ke kanki da mu
section4Title: 4. Waɗanda muke iya rabawa da bayananka
section4Intro: Zamu iya raba bayananka da ɓangarori na uku a waɗannan lokutan:
shareServiceProviders: Masu ba da sabis: hanyoyin biyan kuɗi, abokan jigilar kaya, kayan aikin nazari da sauransu
shareLegalAuthorities: Hukumomin gwamnati: idan doka ta buƙata ko don kare haƙƙinmu na doka
shareBusinessTransfers: Mu’amalolin kasuwanci: idan aka yi haɗa kamfani, siye, ko sayar da dukiya
shareNoSale: Ba ma sayar da bayananka na sirri ga wani ɓangare na uku.
section5Intro: Muna amfani da cookies da makamantansu don waɗannan dalilai:
cookiesRemember: Don tuna saitunanka da abubuwan da kake so
cookiesAnalytics: Don nazarin zirga‑zirgar shafi da yadda ake amfani da shi
cookiesPersonalize: Don daidaita abun ciki da tallace‑tallace da suka dace da kai
cookiesSettings: Kana iya daidaita saitunan cookie a cikin burauzarka.
section6Body: Muna ɗaukar matakan fasaha da na tsari masu dacewa don kare bayananka daga shiga ba tare da izini ba, gyarawa, fallasa ko lalacewa.
section7Intro: Dangane da dokokin da ke aiki a yankinka, kana iya samun haƙƙoƙi kamar haka:
rightsAccess: Haƙƙin neman ganin bayananka na sirri, gyarawa ko gogewa
rightsWithdrawConsent: Haƙƙin janye yardarka a kowane lokaci
rightsObjectProcessing: Haƙƙin ƙin yarda da wasu nau’ikan sarrafa bayanai
rightsPortability: Haƙƙin neman a ba ka bayananka a tsari da za a iya matsarwa
rightsContact: Don amfani da waɗannan haƙƙoƙi, ka tuntube mu.
section8Body: Idan kana wajen [ƙasarka], ana iya tura bayananka a cikin [ƙasarka] kuma a sarrafa su a can, inda dokokin kariyar bayanai za su iya bambanta da na yankinka.
section9Body: Wani lokaci zamu iya sabunta wannan Manufar Sirri. Duk wani canji za a wallafa shi a wannan shafi tare da sabuwar ranar fara aiki.
